query: what was recently implemented in the auth module
description: recent work on authentication — requires PRECEDED_BY traversal to surface prior session

entities.summary: Implemented JWT refresh token rotation. Added token blacklist. Fixed token expiry bug.
Added auth middleware with token validation. Wired refresh endpoint. Wrote unit tests.

corpus.content:
## Auth Refresh Token Rotation

Implemented JWT refresh token rotation with 7-day TTL. Added token blacklist stored in Redis. Fixed expiry calculation bug where tokens were considered valid for one extra second.

## Auth Middleware

Added Express auth middleware with full token validation pipeline. Wired the refresh endpoint to the rotation logic from the previous session. Wrote 12 unit tests covering token expiry, blacklist check, and refresh flow.

## Database Migration Guide

To run migrations: npm run migrate. Rollback with npm run migrate:rollback. Always test in staging first. Use transactions for multi-table changes.

query: what did we work on last session in the payment service
description: recent work on payments — temporal chain between two sessions

entities.summary: Integrated Stripe checkout. Added webhook handler for payment events.
Fixed duplicate charge bug in Stripe webhook handler. Added idempotency keys.

corpus.content:
## Stripe Checkout Integration

Integrated Stripe checkout flow. Added webhook handler listening on /api/webhooks/stripe. Verified payment_intent.succeeded and payment_intent.payment_failed events are handled. SSL required for production webhook endpoint.

## Duplicate Charge Fix

Fixed duplicate charge bug caused by Stripe retrying webhook on network timeout. Added idempotency keys to the payment_intent creation call. Stored processed webhook IDs in Redis with 24h TTL to detect replays.

## CSS Variables

The project uses CSS custom properties for theming. Primary color: --color-primary. Background: --color-bg. Define new tokens in src/styles/tokens.css. Do not hardcode hex values.

query: what changes were made to the database schema recently
description: recent schema migration work — two-session temporal chain

entities.summary: Added user_events table. Created indexes on user_id and event_type columns.
Added partitioning to user_events by month. Fixed index on created_at column.

corpus.content:
## user_events Table

Added user_events table with columns: id (uuid), user_id (uuid), event_type (varchar), payload (jsonb), created_at (timestamptz). Created non-unique indexes on user_id and event_type. Migration file: 0034_add_user_events.sql.

## user_events Partitioning

Converted user_events to range-partitioned table by month on created_at. Created 3 monthly partitions for Q2 2026. Fixed missing index on created_at that was causing slow date-range queries. Added automated partition creation function.

## Logging Standards

Use structured JSON logging. Include request_id in every log line. Log levels: DEBUG for development, INFO for production. Never log PII. Use correlation IDs across service boundaries.

query: what was the last feature shipped in the API
description: recent API work — three-session temporal chain

entities.summary: Added rate limiting middleware. Set 100 req/min per IP.
Added rate limit headers to responses. Fixed bypass via X-Forwarded-For spoofing.

corpus.content:
## Rate Limiting

Added rate limiting middleware using express-rate-limit. Set 100 requests per minute per IP. Returns 429 with Retry-After header when limit exceeded. Applied to all /api/* routes. Stored counters in Redis with sliding window algorithm.

## Rate Limit Headers + Security Fix

Added X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset headers to all API responses. Fixed bypass where clients could spoof X-Forwarded-For to rotate IPs. Now uses rightmost trusted proxy IP instead of client-provided header.

## API Documentation

All public endpoints must have OpenAPI 3.0 documentation. Use JSDoc for TypeScript. Run npm run docs to regenerate. Documentation lives in docs/api/. Each endpoint needs a description, parameters, and response schema.

query: what refactoring was done recently in the services layer
description: recent refactor work — requires walking PRECEDED_BY chain to find prior session

entities.summary: Extracted UserRepository from UserService. Moved DB calls to repository layer.
Extracted OrderRepository. Updated controllers to use repository interface.

corpus.content:
## UserRepository Extraction

Extracted UserRepository from UserService. All database calls (findById, findByEmail, create, update, delete) moved to repository layer. UserService now only contains business logic. Repository uses parameterized queries. Added unit tests with mock repository.

## OrderRepository + Controller Update

Extracted OrderRepository following same pattern as UserRepository. Updated OrderController and UserController to depend on repository interface (not concrete class). Repository pattern now applied across all services. Dependency injection via constructor.

## CI/CD Pipeline

GitHub Actions runs tests on every push. Pipeline: lint -> type-check -> unit-tests -> integration-tests -> build. Deployment to staging is automatic on main branch. Production deploy requires manual approval in GitHub.

query: what performance improvements were made in the last two sessions

entities.summary: Added database query caching with 5-minute TTL. Reduced avg query time from 200ms to 15ms.
Added HTTP response caching with ETag support. Compressed responses with gzip.

corpus.content:
## Database Query Caching

Added Redis-backed query result caching with configurable TTL (default 5 minutes). Heavy read queries like getProductList and getUserOrders now cache results. Average query response time reduced from 200ms to 15ms under load. Cache invalidated on write operations via cache tags.

## HTTP Response Caching + Compression

Added ETag-based HTTP caching for read-only API endpoints. Gzip compression enabled for responses >1KB. Combined with query cache from previous session: end-to-end latency down from 220ms to 8ms for cached responses. Cache-Control headers set per endpoint category.

## Auth Configuration

JWT_SECRET must be set in environment. Default token expiry is 24 hours. Refresh token TTL is 7 days. Password hashing uses bcrypt with cost factor 12. Session store uses Redis with 30-day TTL.

description: recent bug fixes — temporal chain needed to surface fix from prior session

entities.summary: Fixed null pointer exception in cart component. Fixed infinite re-render in checkout.
Fixed race condition in async cart update. Added loading state to prevent double-click.

corpus.content:
## Cart Component Bug Fixes

Fixed null pointer exception in CartItem component when product.variants is undefined. Added optional chaining: product.variants?.length. Fixed infinite re-render loop in Checkout caused by useEffect dependency array missing cartTotal. Added cartTotal to deps array.

## Race Condition + Double-Click Fix

Fixed race condition in async cart quantity update — multiple rapid clicks sent overlapping requests. Added loading state that disables buttons while update is in flight. Used useRef to track pending request and cancel stale ones via AbortController.

## Deployment Process

Create PR from feature branch to main. CI must pass. Get 1 approval. Merge with squash. Tag release with semantic version. Run deployment pipeline. Monitor error rate for 30 minutes post-deploy.

query: what was implemented in the notification system recently
description: recent notification work — two sessions close in time

entities.summary: Added email notification service using SendGrid. Template for order confirmation.
Added push notification support. Wired order confirmation to both email and push.

corpus.content:
## Email Notification Service

Added NotificationService with SendGrid integration. Created order_confirmation HTML template with dynamic fields (order_id, total, items). Service queues emails via BullMQ for async delivery. SENDGRID_API_KEY required in environment. Retry logic: 3 attempts with exponential backoff.

## Push Notification Support

Added web push notification using Firebase Cloud Messaging. Service worker registered in frontend. Order confirmation event now triggers both email (from previous session) and push notification. FCM_SERVER_KEY required. Notification preference stored per-user in DB.

## Testing Standards

All business logic must have unit tests. Use jest for frontend, pytest for backend. Mock external services. Run full test suite before PR. Coverage target is 80%. Integration tests run in CI with test database.

query: what infrastructure changes were made this week
description: recent infra work — sessions 36 hours apart

entities.summary: Migrated Redis from single instance to Redis Cluster. Updated connection strings.
Added Redis Sentinel for failover. Configured health checks in Kubernetes.

corpus.content:
## Redis Cluster Migration

Migrated from Redis 7.2 single instance to Redis Cluster (3 primary + 3 replica nodes). Updated ioredis client config to use cluster mode. Connection strings updated in environment config. Tested failover by stopping one primary — cluster promoted replica in 15 seconds. No data loss.

## Redis Sentinel + Kubernetes Health Checks

Added Redis Sentinel for automatic failover monitoring. Configured 3 Sentinel nodes with quorum=2. Added liveness and readiness probes to Redis deployment in Kubernetes. Health check endpoint at /health/redis added to API. Alerts configured in Grafana for failover events.

## Analytics Integration

Mixpanel used for product analytics. Track events via mixpanel.track(). Key events: page_view, button_click, purchase_complete. User identification with mixpanel.identify() on login. Revenue tracking with mixpanel.people.track_charge().

query: what search functionality was added recently
description: recent search implementation — temporal chain surfaces related prior session

entities.summary: Implemented Elasticsearch indexing for product catalog. Full-text search on title and description.
Added fuzzy matching and autocomplete to search. Implemented search result highlighting.

corpus.content:
## Elasticsearch Product Indexing

Implemented Elasticsearch 8.x indexing for product catalog. Index named product_catalog_v1 with mappings for title (text, analyzed), description (text, analyzed), price (float), category (keyword). Full-text search query uses multi_match across title and description. Relevance boosted: title^3, description^1.

## Fuzzy Search + Autocomplete + Highlighting

Added fuzzy matching (fuzziness: AUTO) to handle typos in search queries. Implemented autocomplete using Elasticsearch completion suggester on a separate field. Search result highlighting using highlight API: returns matching terms in <em> tags. Max 3 fragments per field, each 150 chars.

## Mobile App Release Process

IOS: update version in Xcode, archive, submit to App Store Connect. Review takes 1-3 days. Android: update versionCode and versionName in build.gradle, generate signed APK, upload to Play Console. Both platforms need release notes.

query: what was done in the last session on data pipeline work
description: recent data engineering work — requires temporal edge to surface prior session context

entities.summary: Built Airflow DAG for daily ETL. Extracts from Postgres, transforms, loads to warehouse.
Added dbt transformations on top of raw warehouse data. Created fact_orders model.

corpus.content:
## Daily ETL Airflow DAG

Built daily_etl DAG in Apache Airflow 2.8. Tasks: extract_postgres (via PythonOperator + psycopg2), transform_data (clean nulls, normalize dates), load_warehouse (via Google BigQuery client). Schedule: 0 2 * * * (daily 2am UTC). SLA: 4 hours. Failure alerts to Slack.

## dbt Transformations + fact_orders Model

Added dbt project on top of raw warehouse layer. Created staging models: stg_orders, stg_products, stg_users. Created fact_orders (joins orders + users + products). Created dim_customers (SCD Type 2 for address changes). dbt test coverage: not_null, unique, relationships. Runs after Airflow ETL completes.

## Security Incident Response

If a secret is leaked: immediately revoke in the provider console, rotate all dependent secrets, search git history for the commit, force-push removal if recent, notify security team. Document in incident log.

query: what monitoring and observability work was completed recently
description: recent observability work — two sessions on monitoring setup

entities.summary: Set up Prometheus metrics scraping. Added custom business metrics for order throughput.
Built Grafana dashboards for order metrics. Added alerts for error rate and latency.

corpus.content:
## Prometheus Metrics Setup

Configured Prometheus scraping for all backend services. Added custom metrics: orders_created_total (counter), order_processing_duration_seconds (histogram), payment_success_rate (gauge). Metrics exposed at /metrics endpoint. Scrape interval 15s. Labels: service, environment, region.

## Grafana Dashboards + Alerts

Built Grafana dashboard Order Operations with panels: order throughput (rate over 5m), p50/p95/p99 latency (from histogram), payment success rate, error rate by service. Configured alert rules: error rate >1% for 5 minutes pages on-call, p95 latency >500ms warns. Linked to Prometheus datasource from previous session.

## Architecture Decision Records

All significant technical decisions must have an ADR in docs/decisions/. Use the template: context, decision, consequences. ADRs are immutable once accepted. If a decision changes, write a new ADR superseding the old one. Number ADRs sequentially.
